description: BigGeo provides geospatial data products and a Datalab platform for managing, distributing, and monetizing spatial datasets. Its BigGeo AI product connects licensed spatial data to AI assistants like Claude and ChatGPT for location-based analysis.
summary: BigGeo exposes a documented OAuth-protected MCP server for BigGeo AI at https://mcp.biggeo.com/mcp; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was verified on biggeo.com.
